changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-project-detection/src/detect.rs (79.5%, 24 uncovered lines)

Uncovered paths:
- `detect_npm_workspace()` (lines 228-258): npm workspaces parsing - array form, string form, missing workspaces key
- `extract_toml_array()` (lines 262-300): multi-line TOML array parsing, items on same line as opening bracket, closing bracket with items
- `clean_toml_string()` (lines 303-314): quote stripping, empty after cleaning
- Various single-line gaps in main detect function: specific project type detection branches

Tests needed:
- Unit test detect_npm_workspace with workspaces as array, string, absent
- Unit test extract_toml_array with inline array, multi-line array
- Unit test clean_toml_string edge cases

Acceptance: coverage >= 85% for detect.rs
Test project detection for npm workspaces and TOML array parsing
